messages.选择界面显示语言。: Choose the language used throughout the interface.
messages.界面字体与代码/终端等宽字体分开设置；代码与终端共用同一字体族，字号可独立调整。: Set interface and monospace fonts separately; the editor and terminal share one font family while their sizes remain independent.
messages.界面与代码/终端字体均支持系统默认；代码与终端共用同一等宽字体族，字号可独立调整: The interface, editor, and terminal all support the system default; the editor and terminal share one monospace font family while their sizes remain independent.
messages.配置默认启动方式与终端配置文件。: Configure the default startup behavior and terminal profiles.
messages.（操作系统切换明暗时自动跟随）: (updates automatically when the system appearance changes)
messages.用于菜单、侧栏、标签和状态栏。: Used for menus, sidebars, tabs, and the status bar.
messages.用于菜单、侧栏、标签和状态栏，支持选择系统默认字体。: Used for menus, sidebars, tabs, and the status bar. Supports the system default font.
messages.代码编辑器与终端共用同一等宽字体族。: The editor and terminal use the same monospace font family.
messages.代码编辑器与终端共用同一等宽字体族，支持选择系统默认字体。: The editor and terminal use the same monospace font family. Supports the system default font.
messages.仅影响编辑器中的代码。: Only affects code in the editor.
messages.当前为浏览器预览模式，项目、文件、终端等功能不可用。请使用: This is a browser preview. Projects, files, and terminals are unavailable. Run
messages.启动，并在弹出的桌面窗口中操作。: and use the desktop window that opens.
messages.当前项目「{name}」暂无终端，点击标签栏 + 新建: The current project, “{name}”, has no terminal. Use + in the tab bar to create one.
messages.请先选择或添加项目，终端将默认基于当前项目创建: Select or add a project first. New terminals start in the current project.
messages.当前环境无法另存为: Cannot Save As in this environment
messages.当前环境无法新建窗口: Cannot open a new window in this environment
messages.无法确定该路径所属项目: Could not determine which project owns this path
messages.无法确定该目录所属项目: Could not determine which project owns this folder
messages.文件夹内的全部内容都会被删除，且无法撤销。: All contents in this folder will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
messages.即将永久删除以下文件夹：: You are about to permanently delete this folder:
messages.即将写入项目外的符号链接目标，确定继续？: This will write through a symlink to a target outside the project. Continue?
messages.无法验证符号链接写入目标，已取消保存: Could not verify the symlink write target; save cancelled
messages.授权符号链接目标失败，已取消保存: Failed to authorize the symlink target; save cancelled
messages.在文件管理器中打开失败: {error}: Could not open in File Explorer: {error}
messages.无法在文本编辑器中显示此文件，因为它可能是二进制文件或使用了不支持的文本编码。: The file is not displayed in the text editor because it is either binary or uses an unsupported text encoding.
messages.文件过大，无法在文本编辑器中打开。: The file is too large to open in the text editor.
messages.文件过大（超过 256MB），无法打开。: The file is too large (over 256MB) to open.
messages.文件过大（超过 500MB），无法打开。: The file is too large (over 500MB) to open.
messages.超过 16MB 的文件以分块方式打开，不可编辑: Files over 16MB open in chunks and cannot be edited
messages.超过 100MB 的文件仅只读分块预览，不可编辑: Files over 100MB are read-only chunk preview only
messages.文件共 {total} 行，已跳到最后一行: File has {total} lines; jumped to the last line
messages.已以只读预览打开大文件（{size}）: Opened large file in read-only preview ({size})
messages.已以只读预览打开大文件（{size}，不可编辑）: Opened large file in read-only preview ({size}; not editable)
messages.文件较大（{size}），已关闭语法高亮以保持流畅: Large file ({size}): syntax highlighting disabled for responsiveness
messages.文件较大（{size}），已关闭高亮/换行/折叠等以保持流畅: Large file ({size}): highlighting, wrapping, and folding disabled for responsiveness
messages.文件较大（{size}），已以纯文本模式打开（限撤销、无高亮）: Large file ({size}): opened in plain-text mode (limited undo, no highlighting)
messages.无法在文本编辑器中打开文件夹。: Folders cannot be opened in the text editor.
messages.无法访问此文件，它可能已被移动、删除或没有读取权限。: Unable to access this file. It may have been moved, deleted, or you may not have permission to read it.
messages.无法打开编辑器。: The editor could not be opened.
messages.在关联的应用程序中打开失败: {error}: Could not open with associated application: {error}
messages.目录不可用，请重新定位: Folder unavailable. Please relocate the project.
messages.请先选择或添加项目: Select or add a project first
messages.收起终端（任务继续在后台运行）: Collapse terminal (tasks keep running in the background)
messages.将终止当前项目的 {count} 个运行中终端: This will terminate {count} running terminal(s) in the current project
messages.关闭后将终止当前 shell 进程，会话中的未保存输出会丢失。: Closing will terminate the current shell process and discard unsaved output.
messages.关闭后将终止对应 shell 进程，会话中的未保存输出会丢失。: Closing will terminate the relevant shell processes and discard unsaved output.
messages.请先选择或添加项目，再创建终端: Select or add a project before creating a terminal
messages.已达到每个项目 {count} 个终端的上限: Maximum of {count} terminals per project reached
messages.左键：默认配置；右键：选择终端配置: Left click: default profile; right click: choose a profile
messages.新建终端（无项目时将创建临时项目）: New terminal (creates a temporary project if none is selected)
messages.清除目录限定，回到当前项目根: Clear folder limit and return to the current project root
messages.输入后缀/扩展名，如 .ts 或 ts: Enter a suffix or extension, e.g. .ts or ts
messages.输入关键词、通配符（*）或选择文件类型开始搜索: Enter keywords, wildcards (*), or pick a file type to search
messages.输入关键词搜索文件内容: Enter keywords to search file contents
messages.输入关键词、通配符（*）或选择常见类型开始搜索: Enter keywords, a wildcard (*), or choose a common type to start searching
messages.从常见模板填充（Python 后端 + 前端）: Fill from a common template (Python backend + frontend)
messages.点击“添加任务”或“模板”快速开始: Click “Add Task” or “Template” to get started
messages.Windows 下使用 CMD，可用 && 连接命令；换行会自动转为 &&。工作: Uses CMD on Windows. Join commands with &&; line breaks are converted to &&. No need to add cd when a working directory is set.
messages.留空=项目根；可相对，如 backend/: Leave empty for project root; relative paths such as backend/ are allowed
messages.该文件不在 Git HEAD 中（可能是新文件）: This file is not in Git HEAD (it may be new)
messages.无法读取 Git HEAD 版本: {error}: Could not read Git HEAD version: {error}
messages.当前环境无法比较 Git 版本: Cannot compare Git versions in this environment
messages.Ctrl + Shift + C：复制完整文件路径；Alt + C：复制 @项目: Ctrl + Shift + C: copy full file path; Alt + C: copy @project/relative-path#Lline reference
messages.开发构建：项目数据在仓库 .dev/；主题字体等保存在开发服务器源下: Dev build: project data lives in the repo .dev/ folder; theme/fonts use the Vite origin storage.
messages.正式构建：项目数据在 %APPDATA%\\com.qingcode.app\\: Release build: project data lives in %APPDATA%\com.qingcode.app\; theme/fonts are not shared with the dev build.
messages.在文件管理器中显示失败: {error}: Could not reveal in File Explorer: {error}
messages.可不选；未指定时使用内置普通 PowerShell 终端。: Optional. Uses the built-in PowerShell terminal when no profile is selected.
messages.点击 + 使用默认配置；右键 + 可选择其它配置。启动命令留空时启动 Power: Click + for the default profile; right-click + to choose another profile. An empty startup command starts PowerShell. Programs such as opencode can rename the tab from the window title, or you can double-click a tab to rename it manually.
messages.将移除工作区记录并关闭相关终端与标签页，不会删除磁盘上的项目文件。: This removes workspace records and closes related terminals and tabs. Files on disk are not deleted.
messages.暂无项目。点击上方按钮添加。: No projects yet. Use the buttons above to add one.
messages.全选当前列表: Select all in the current list
messages.顶栏 ✕ 仅隐藏显示；此处「永久删除」才会清除项目记录: The ✕ in the title bar only hides a project; only “Delete Permanently” here removes its record.
messages.{action}会丢失这些更改，且无法撤销。: {action} will discard these changes and cannot be undone.
messages.确定要关闭应用程序吗？: Are you sure you want to close the application?
messages.{count} 个终端仍在运行，退出后将终止。: {count} terminal(s) are still running and will be terminated when you quit.
messages.该项目有 {count} 个运行中的终端，移除后将被终止。\n不会删除磁盘上的项:
This project has {count} running terminal(s), which will be terminated when it is removed.
Files on disk will not be deleted.
messages.不会删除磁盘上的项目文件。: Files on disk will not be deleted.
messages.工作区设置作用于当前项目「{name}」。多数界面设置仅用户作用域可用；工作区主: Workspace settings apply to the current project “{name}”. Most UI settings are user-scoped; workspace is mainly for project-settings.json.
messages.此设置仅在用户作用域中可用: This setting can only be applied in the User scope
messages.指定 QingCode 使用的颜色主题。选择“跟随系统”时随操作系统明暗切换。: Specifies the QingCode color theme. Choose “Auto” to follow the OS light/dark mode.
messages.控制菜单、标题栏、侧栏、标签和状态栏的字号（像素）。: Controls the font size in pixels for menus, the title bar, side bars, tabs, and the status bar.
messages.控制编辑器中的字号（像素）。: Controls the font size in pixels in the editor.
messages.控制编辑器中的字号（像素），对应用户设置 editor.fontSize。: Controls the editor font size in pixels (user setting editor.fontSize).
messages.用于菜单、侧栏、标签和状态栏的字体族。: Font family used for menus, side bars, tabs, and the status bar.
messages.用于菜单、标题栏、侧栏、标签和状态栏的字体族。可选择本机已安装字体。: Font family used for menus, the title bar, side bars, tabs, and the status bar. You can also pick fonts installed on this PC.
messages.控制编辑器字体族。终端默认共用同一等宽字体。: Controls the font family for the editor. The terminal shares the same monospace font by default.
messages.控制编辑器字体族。终端默认共用同一等宽字体。可选择本机已安装字体。: Controls the font family for the editor. The terminal shares the same monospace font by default. You can also pick fonts installed on this PC.
messages.用于菜单、侧栏、标签和状态栏，可选择系统默认或本机已安装字体。: Used for menus, sidebars, tabs, and the status bar. Choose the system default or any installed font.
messages.代码编辑器与终端共用同一等宽字体族，可选择系统默认或本机已安装字体。: The editor and terminal share one monospace font family. Choose the system default or any installed font.
messages.控制终端的字号（像素）。: Controls the font size in pixels of the terminal.
messages.新建终端时使用的默认配置。未指定时使用内置普通 PowerShell 终端。: Default profile used when creating a terminal. Uses the built-in PowerShell terminal when unset.
messages.终端配置文件可在下方管理（名称与启动命令）。: Manage terminal profiles below (name and startup command).
messages.选择界面显示语言。更改后立即生效。: Choose the UI display language. Changes apply immediately.
messages.选择界面显示语言。更改后立即生效。也可从用户语言包目录加载自定义 JSON。: Choose the UI language. Changes apply immediately. You can also load custom JSON packs from the user locales folder.
messages.将 JSON 语言包放入应用数据目录的 locales 文件夹（可参考其中的 _: Put JSON locale packs in the app data locales folder (see _example.json there). Click Refresh to load them into the list above.
messages.在编辑器中打开全局 default-settings.json（JSON5，可写: Open global default-settings.json in the editor (JSON5 with comments). Use qingcode.projects for the project list; sync on startup when qingcode.projects.syncOnStartup is true.
Open the current project’s .qingcode/project-settings.json in the editor (JSON5 with comments).
messages.files.exclude / search.exclude / useIgno: files.exclude / search.exclude / useIgnoreFiles / followSymlinks, explorer.excludeGitIgnore, files.encoding, editor.minimap.enabled, editor.formatOnSave / formatOnPaste, bracket colorization/guides, and terminal.integrated.scrollback / cursorBlinking are effective. Keys marked “not planned” (e.g. linkedEditing) are saved but do not change behavior. See the help docs.
messages.在编辑区右侧显示代码缩略图，便于快速跳转。大于 5MB 的文件会自动隐藏。对应: Show a code thumbnail on the right of the editor for quick navigation. Hidden automatically for files larger than 5MB. Maps to editor.minimap.enabled.
messages.请先选择项目，再配置工作区小地图。: Select a project first to configure the workspace minimap.
messages.左右拖曳调整小地图宽度: Drag left or right to resize the minimap
messages.会话输出已恢复；进程将按原配置重新启动: Session output restored; the process will restart with its previous configuration
messages.会话输出已恢复；可从终端标签重启进程: Session output restored; restart the process from the terminal tab
messages.支持全局与项目两级 JSON 配置（参考 VS Code）：全局对所有项目生效，: Supports global and project JSON settings (like VS Code): global applies to all projects; project settings override matching global keys.
messages.全局设置对所有项目生效，类似 VS Code 的用户设置（User Settin: Global settings apply to every project, like VS Code User Settings. Use the button below to open the JSON document in the main editor.
messages.已在编辑器中打开设置文件: Opened settings file in the editor
messages.已写入默认模板并在编辑器中打开: Wrote the default template and opened it in the editor
messages.当前环境无法打开设置文件: Cannot open settings files in this environment
messages.编辑后使用 Ctrl+S 保存。项目设置文件位于项目目录，可随仓库提交；全局设置: Save with Ctrl+S after editing. Project settings live in the project folder and can be committed; global settings are stored in the local app data directory.
messages.将项目专属配置保存在 .qingcode/project-settings.js: Store project-specific configuration in .qingcode/project-settings.json for future features.
messages.全局设置对所有项目生效，类似 VS Code 的用户设置（User Settin: Global settings apply to every project, like VS Code User Settings.
messages.项目设置仅作用于当前项目，并覆盖同名全局项，类似 VS Code 的工作区设置（: Project settings apply only to the current project and override matching global keys, like VS Code Workspace Settings.
messages.未选择项目时只能编辑全局设置；选择项目后可切换到「项目」作用域。: Without a selected project you can only edit global settings; select a project to switch to the Project scope.
messages.请先选择项目，再配置项目设置。: Select a project before configuring project settings.
messages.当前环境无法写入设置文件: Cannot write settings files in this environment
messages.设置必须是 JSON 对象: Settings must be a JSON object
messages.custom 必须是 JSON 对象: custom must be a JSON object
messages.项目设置必须是 JSON 对象: Project settings must be a JSON object
messages.项目设置必须包含 custom 对象: Project settings must include a custom object
messages.请先选择项目，再配置项目自定义设置。: Select a project before configuring project custom settings.
messages.当前项目「{name}」的配置文件：: Configuration file for the current project “{name}”:
messages.设置常用操作的按键组合。: Set key combinations for common actions.
messages.打开命令面板，搜索并运行编辑器命令。: Open the command palette to search and run editor commands.
messages.打开当前文件的符号列表，快速跳转到函数、类或标题。: Open a symbol list for the current file and jump to a function, class, or heading.
messages.输入符号名称进行筛选…: Type a symbol name to filter…
messages.当前文件没有可识别的符号: No recognizable symbols in this file
messages.输入命令名称进行筛选…: Type a command name to filter…
messages.输入文件名进行筛选…（> 前缀搜索命令）: Type a file name to filter… (> prefix for commands)
messages.按文件名模糊搜索并打开项目中的文件。: Fuzzy-search file names and open files in your projects.
messages.跳转到当前文件中的指定行号。: Jump to a specific line in the active file.
messages.打开搜索面板，默认在当前项目中搜索文件与内容。: Open the search panel, scoped to the current project by default.
messages.显示或隐藏终端面板。: Show or hide the terminal panel.
messages.点击输入框后按新的组合键。: Click a field, then press a new key combination.
messages.请输入 Ctrl、Alt、Shift 或 Meta 加按键的组合。: Use Ctrl, Alt, Shift, or Meta with another key.
messages.以下快捷键由编辑器保留，不可在此修改：: These shortcuts are reserved by the editor and cannot be changed here:
messages.保存当前编辑器中的文件。: Save the file in the active editor.
messages.使用 Prettier、rustfmt、shfmt、ruff/black 或 g: Format the current file with Prettier, rustfmt, shfmt, or gofmt (the tool must be installed locally; Python is not supported yet).
messages.文件过大（>{size}），无法在编辑器内格式化: File is too large (>{size}) to format in the editor
messages.暂不支持 Python 格式化: Python formatting is not supported yet
messages.暂不支持格式化该语言/扩展名（.{ext}）: Formatting is not supported for this language/extension (.{ext})
messages.暂不支持格式化该语言/扩展名（无法识别文件类型）: Formatting is not supported for this language/extension (unknown file type)
messages.未找到 Prettier。请在项目执行：npm i -D prettier: Prettier was not found. Run in the project: npm i -D prettier
messages.未找到 rustfmt。请执行：rustup component add rus: rustfmt was not found. Run: rustup component add rustfmt
messages.未找到 shfmt。请安装 shfmt 并加入 PATH: shfmt was not found. Install shfmt and add it to PATH
messages.未找到 gofmt。请安装 Go 并确保 gofmt 在 PATH 中: gofmt was not found. Install Go and ensure gofmt is on PATH
messages.复制当前文件或选中项的完整路径。: Copy the full path of the current file or selection.
messages.复制当前文件的引用（含行号范围），便于粘贴到对话或文档。: Copy a file reference (with line range) for pasting into chats or docs.
messages.该按键组合已由编辑器或开发工具使用。: This key combination is already used by the editor or developer tools.
messages.该快捷键已用于「{name}」。: This shortcut is already assigned to “{name}”.
messages.从侧边栏打开文件开始编辑: Open a file from the sidebar to start editing
messages.控制具有未保存更改的编辑器何时自动保存。: Controls when editors with unsaved changes are saved automatically.
messages.在 afterDelay 模式下，停止编辑后等待多久再保存（毫秒）。: In afterDelay mode, how long to wait after editing stops before saving (milliseconds).
messages.保存自动保存设置失败: {error}: Could not save auto save settings: {error}
messages.请先选择项目，再配置工作区自动保存。: Select a project before configuring workspace auto save.
messages.暖色森林绿（Everforest 风格）: Warm forest green inspired by Everforest
messages.将 QingCode 添加到资源管理器「打开方式」菜单（常见代码/文本扩展名，不: Add QingCode to Explorer’s Open with menu for common code/text extensions without changing defaults. Writes to the current-user registry; no admin required.
messages.注册成功。可在资源管理器中右键文件 → 打开方式 → QingCode。: Registered. In Explorer: right-click a file → Open with → QingCode.
messages.仅 Windows 桌面版支持此功能。: Available only in the Windows desktop app.
messages.即将执行来自项目配置（{path}）的命令。未信任的仓库可能包含恶意脚本，请确认: Commands from the project config ({path}) are about to run. Untrusted repos may contain malicious scripts — review before continuing.
messages.即将执行终端配置中的自定义启动命令。请确认命令内容后再继续。: A custom startup command from a terminal profile is about to run. Review the command before continuing.
messages.是否信任此项目？: Do you trust the authors of this folder?
messages.信任「{name}」中的文件作者后，可编辑文件、使用终端并运行项目脚本。受限模式: Trust the authors of “{name}” to edit files, use the terminal, and run project scripts. Restricted mode is browse-only and will not execute project commands.
messages.受限模式：只能浏览，无法编辑或运行: Restricted mode: browse only — no edit or run
messages.受限模式：只能浏览文件，无法编辑、使用终端或运行脚本。: Restricted mode: you can browse files, but cannot edit, use the terminal, or run scripts.
messages.当前为受限模式，请先信任此项目后再运行: Restricted mode — trust this project before running
messages.当前为受限模式，无法打开终端: Restricted mode — cannot open a terminal
messages.打开项目时将询问是否信任: You will be asked to trust the project when opening it
messages.已信任此项目的运行配置: This project’s run configs are trusted
messages.首次运行前需确认或信任项目: Confirm or trust the project before the first run
messages.磁盘上的文件与本地未保存修改不一致。: The file on disk differs from your unsaved local changes.
messages.磁盘文件已更改，请先重新加载或比较后再保存：{name}: The file on disk changed. Reload or compare before saving: {name}
messages.检测到 {count} 个未保存草稿（可能来自异常退出）。是否恢复？: {count} unsaved draft(s) found (possibly from a crash). Restore them?
messages.预览并确认后写入全部匹配: Preview matches, then confirm before writing
messages.结果已截断，仅替换当前列表中的匹配: Results truncated; only listed matches will be replaced
messages.暂无工作区，可先保存当前顶栏项目: No workspaces yet. Save the current title-bar projects first.
messages.将当前顶栏可见项目及其标签/终端快照打包: Pack currently visible title-bar projects with their tab/terminal snapshots
messages.暂无多项目工作区。可先在顶栏显示相关项目，再点上方保存。: No multi-project workspaces yet. Show related projects in the title bar, then save above.
messages.请先在顶栏显示至少一个项目，再保存为多项目工作区: Show at least one project in the title bar before saving a multi-project workspace
messages.请先选择要加入工作区的项目: Select projects to include in the workspace first
messages.工作区中的项目均不可用，无法更新会话: No projects in this workspace are available; cannot update sessions
messages.工作区中的项目均不可用，请先重新定位或添加项目: No projects in this workspace are available. Relocate or add projects first
messages.仅删除工作区快照，不会移除项目或磁盘文件。: This only deletes the workspace snapshot. Projects and files on disk are not removed.
messages.打开多项目工作区失败：无法切换到目标项目: Could not open multi-project workspace: failed to switch to the target project
messages.{count} 个项目已不在列表中: {count} project(s) no longer in the list
messages.Git 功能需要 Tauri 桌面环境: Git features require the Tauri desktop app
messages.当前项目不是 Git 仓库: The current project is not a Git repository
messages.工作区没有未提交的更改: The working tree has no uncommitted changes
messages.选择一个更改查看差异: Select a change to view its diff
messages.未跟踪文件尚无 Git Diff；添加到仓库后即可查看。: Untracked files have no Git diff yet. Add the file to the repository to view one.
messages.该文件当前没有可显示的未暂存差异。: This file has no unstaged diff to display.
messages.当前环境无法重新打开文件: Cannot reopen files in this environment
messages.这会放弃当前文件的未保存修改，并按 {encoding} 重新读取磁盘内容。: This discards unsaved changes and reads the disk file again as {encoding}.
messages.转换文件编码，保存后生效: Convert file encoding; applied when saved
messages.按指定编码重新读取磁盘文件，未保存修改不会被保留: Read the disk file again with a chosen encoding; unsaved changes are not kept
messages.文件编码：可在此转换，保存后生效: File encoding: choose an encoding here and save to convert
messages.转换编码（下次保存）· 或按编码重新打开: Save with encoding, or reopen from disk with encoding
messages.显示所有打开的文件（{hidden} 个已折叠，最多 {max}）: Show all open files ({hidden} folded, max {max})
messages.已达到最多同时打开 {max} 个标签，请先关闭部分文件: Reached the limit of {max} open tabs. Close some files first.
messages.正式构建启动后约 3 秒静默查询 Gitee / GitHub Release。: About 3 seconds after a release build starts, silently query Gitee / GitHub Releases. You can still check manually when this is off.
messages.查询远端最新便携版；发现新版本时提示打开下载页，不会自动安装。: Query the latest portable release. When a newer version is found, you can open the download page; nothing is installed automatically.
messages.检查更新需要 Tauri 桌面环境: Checking for updates requires the Tauri desktop app
messages.当前已是最新版本: You are already on the latest version
messages.QingCode {version} 可用。是否打开下载页？: QingCode {version} is available. Open the download page?
messages.文件过大，无法显示差异对比: File too large to display diff
messages.差异对比支持的最大文件大小为 {size}: Diff comparison supports files up to {size}
